subcategory: 3D globe with rotating earth and twinkling stars
use_cases: Hero section centerpiece for global or connectivity-themed landing pages
Decorative globe element for SaaS dashboards with international focus
Visual loading state with ambient animation for mapping or travel apps
3D globe component for educational or news media platforms
Animated globe background for fintech or global business applications
ai_summary: A decorative globe component featuring an auto-rotating Earth image with twinkling star animations. The component uses CSS animations and complex layered shadow effects to create a 3D spherical appearance in a space-like setting. Perfect for hero sections or landing pages that need a global/connectivity theme.
